message:
feat(graph,routing): route graph command through external workspaces

Add routing support to the `graph` command so that cross-project issue
IDs (e.g. `org/repo#42`) resolve to the correct external workspace's
storage rather than the local one.

- `routed_cli_for_graph`: clears the `--db` override when the target
  issue resolves as external, so the external beads dir takes precedence
- `open_storage_for_graph`: resolves the route and opens storage from
  the routed beads dir when a single external issue is requested
- New e2e test `e2e_routing_graph_external_issue_via_main_workspace`
  verifies that `br graph <route>` returns nodes from the external
  workspace, including the rooted parent and its dependent
- Minor rustfmt touch-ups in e2e_global_flags.rs and e2e_graph.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
